items.name: math-loader
items.title: Math Loader
items.description: Base SVG path loader primitive powered by Motion.

items.name: trig-wave-loader
items.title: Trig Wave Loader
items.description: Sine and cosine curves drawn progressively from left to right.

items.name: unit-circle-loader
items.title: Unit Circle Loader
items.description: A curvy arc growing from 0 to the full circumference 2πr.

items.name: polar-2cos-loader
items.title: Rose Curve Loader
items.description: A rose curve with 3 petals, drawn from zero to the full flower.

items.name: lissajous-loader
items.title: Lissajous Loader
items.description: A Lissajous figure traced by two sine waves at different frequencies.

items.name: spiral-loader
items.title: Spiral Loader
items.description: An Archimedean spiral winding outward from the center.

items.name: cardioid-loader
items.title: Cardioid Loader
items.description: A heart-shaped cardioid drawn in polar coordinates.

items.name: lemniscate-loader
items.title: Lemniscate Loader
items.description: A figure-eight curve from the lemniscate of Bernoulli.

items.name: log-spiral-loader
items.title: Log Spiral Loader
items.description: A logarithmic spiral that grows exponentially with angle.

items.name: damped-sine-loader
items.title: Damped Sine Loader
items.description: A damped oscillation drawn progressively from left to right.

items.name: ellipse-loader
items.title: Ellipse Loader
items.description: An ellipse traced parametrically from zero to a full revolution.

items.name: fermat-spiral-loader
items.title: Fermat Spiral Loader
items.description: A parabolic spiral where radius grows with the square root of angle.

items.name: even-rose-loader
items.title: Even Rose Loader
items.description: An eight-petaled rose from an even-frequency cosine.

items.name: butterfly-loader
items.title: Butterfly Loader
items.description: The butterfly curve traced in polar coordinates.

items.name: epicycloid-loader
items.title: Epicycloid Loader
items.description: A spirograph curve traced by a circle rolling around another.
